name: CLI Agent Provider (Codex)
description: Adds the Codex CLI as a provider, in two ways. As a TTY session it runs the real interactive Codex TUI in a pane, the same as Claude's — its own interface, its own approval prompts, which the cockpit cannot see into. As an SDK session it is driven headless, a subprocess per turn (`codex exec --json`); that route has no in-band permission channel at all, because Codex sets approval-policy to never in headless mode. Configure the sandbox per profile. Requires the codex CLI installed and authenticated (`codex login`) on the machine running Cockpit.
author: Cockpit
